metadata.name: bazaar-map
notes: MVP shot list for previews/validation. Shots are optional at runtime but useful for automated capture and QA.
All shot positions are approximate and may be adjusted once blockout exists in-engine.

shots.label: Topdown establishing
shots.description: High topdown for quick layout verification (lanes, cuts, spawns).

shots.label: Spawn A -> Bazaar
shots.description: Player-eye view from Spawn A Courtyard looking north into Bazaar Main.

shots.label: Spawn B -> Bazaar
shots.description: Player-eye view from Spawn B Gate Plaza looking south through the Hero Arch into Bazaar Main.

shots.label: Main lane mid (jog) north
shots.description: Player-eye view in jog segment to confirm broken long LoS and cover rhythm.

shots.label: West side hall mid
shots.description: Flank lane verification: width, cover pockets, and cut visibility.

shots.label: East side hall mid
shots.description: Flank lane verification: width, cover pockets, and cut visibility.

shots.label: Hero arch approach
shots.description: Approach to hero arch landmark from inside BZ-M3; confirms landmark framing and sightline control.

shots.label: Canopy beat (look up)
shots.description: Bazaar canopy beat: camera pitches up slightly (lookAt z>pos z) to validate cloth spans + lighting variation.

shots.label: BZ-M2 east facade
shots.description: Hero merchant facade review for the BZ_M2_JOG east wall; validates centered balcony stack and window hierarchy.

shots.label: Spawn A hero facade
shots.description: Spawn courtyard landmark facade review; validates centered stack, quieter neighboring rhythm, and readable value separation.
reviewFocus: dominant center composition with quieter neighbors

shots.label: Spawn B back wall
shots.description: Spawn B courtyard shell review; validates the centered front-door composition, repeated standard windows, and mirrored side returns.
reviewFocus: standard-window rhythm across front and sides
mustShow: three standard windows on each side of the front door
three upper standard windows on each side of the hero bay

shots.label: Spawn B center-bay hero
shots.description: Spawn B north wall hero review; validates the dominant stained-glass bay, layered pediment, and stone entablature centered above the main door.
reviewFocus: hero window dominance over the standard window field
layered pediment and entablature reading as one centered axis
mustShow: hero stained-glass bay centered directly over the front door
stone entablature with symmetric corbels below the hero bay
layered pediment above the hero surround
three upper standard windows framing each side of the center bay
